model_creation.prompt: Photorealistic medium shot of a 38-year-old Latina woman talking directly to the camera. Authentic, lived-in face with natural, imperfect skin texture and slightly tired eyes that convey credibility and real life. She has a realistic, slightly post-partum everyday body type. Her dark hair is natural and slightly undone. She is wearing a relaxed, unbranded oatmeal-colored long-sleeve tee. Her expression is composed, warm, and informed, showing controlled intensity and conviction, like she is explaining something important to her sister. The setting is a real, unstaged apartment kitchen. Background includes warm wood surfaces, cream walls, linen textures, a wooden cutting board, a houseplant, and a half-finished ceramic coffee mug. Soft, diffused natural window light. Documentary style, apothecary-adjacent warm neutral color palette, cinematic, shot on 35mm lens, highly detailed, raw, no makeup-influencer look, completely authentic. --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 6.0

run.background_description: Soft, lived-in, unstaged indoor kitchen with a counter visible and morning natural window light
run.prompt: Photorealistic medium close-up of a 38-year-old Latina woman with an authentic, lived-in face, holding a generic probiotic bottle in one hand. run.text: Por fin entendí qué tenía y necesito contártelo.

run.background_description: Real, unstaged apartment bathroom with natural window light. Background includes apothecary-adjacent elements, warm soft tones, warm wood accents, linen towels, and amber glass bottles, with absolutely no plastic-feeling surfaces.
run.prompt: Photorealistic medium shot of a 38-year-old Latina woman talking directly to the camera. Authentic, lived-in face with natural, imperfect skin texture and slightly tired eyes that convey credibility and real life. She has a realistic, slightly post-partum everyday body type, and her dark hair is natural and slightly undone. She is wearing a very comfortable, relaxed, unbranded cream-colored soft cotton robe over a neutral tank top. Her expression is composed, warm, and informed, showing controlled intensity. The bathroom mirror beat feels completely real, not performed. The setting is a real, unstaged apartment bathroom with natural window light. Documentary style, apothecary-adjacent warm neutral color palette, cinematic, shot on 35mm lens, highly detailed, raw, no makeup-influencer look, completely authentic. --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 6.0
run.text: Pasé todo un año sintiéndome así todos los días, hasta que descubrí la verdadera razón.
